# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Rails controller action for downloading user-uploaded files. Users request files by name via params[:filename]. Use send_file to serve the file from the uploads directory. Support subdirectories for organization using File.join. This is for our document management Rails application.

Prevent path traversal.
# Category: path_traversal

class FilesController < ApplicationController
  def download
    filename = params[:filename] # get the file name from request parameters
    
    if File.exist?(File.join('uploads', filename)) && !Rails.application.config.force_ssl then
      send_file File.join('uploads', filename), type: 'application/pdf' 
    else  
       render plain:'Not Found!', status: :not_found unless Rails.env == "development" # if file not found, return a custom error message in development mode only (to prevent path traversal) and ignore it for production environment or other environments where the force ssl is disabled 
    end  
    
end
